person.name: Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams

nameForms.fullText: Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Reginald de Mure, (died 1340) Lord of Cowdams, Cameskan and Abercorn was a Scottish noble. He was the Lord Chamberlain of Scotland between 1329 and 1333 and between 1334 and 1340.

Mure received the Abercorn estate upon his marriage to Sybilla de Graham. He was appointed as Chamberlain of Scotland to King David II of Scotland, serving from 1329 to 1333. Granted the lands of Tullibardine, after the forfeiture of Andrew Murray of Tullibardine in 1333, for supporting Edward Balliol, the lands appear to have been restored to the Murray family in 1341. He was again serving as Chamberlain of Scotland between 1334 and 1340. Mure was appointed as one of the commissioners to treat with the English, of a truce. He died in 1340.

«b»Issue«/b»
Reginald married Sybilla, daughter of John de Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn & Eskdale and his wife Isabella, they are known to have had the following issue.

1.) William de Mure of Abercorn, died without male issue. His daughter Christina married John Lindsay of Byres, passing Abercorn into the Lindsay family.

2.) Gilchrist de Mure of Cowdams, had issue.

3.) Alicia de Mure, married firstly William de Herch and secondly John Stewart of Ralston, had issue.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams於大約1280年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight22歲，母親Margaret Lindsey20歲。他和Sibilla Graham至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1340年在他的家鄉享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French muer ‘mewer’, i.e. someone who tended to hawks in the cages in which they were kept while moulting. Compare Mew .

variants.name: Mura
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Akio, Hideo, Masao, Nanako, Tsutomu, Yoshi.  French Alphonse, Amie, Henri.
German: altered form of some similar (like-sounding) German or perhaps French surname. It is also common in France (Alsace), where it was first recorded in the form Morrau, later Murra(w).
Italian (southern Sardinia): topographic name or nickname from Sardinian mura ‘mulberry’ or ‘blackberry’.

variants.name: Muir
meanings: Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived on a moor, from Older Scots muir ‘moor’ (an expanse of bare, wild upland country). There has been some confusion with Mure .

variants.name: Morea
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Saverio, Domenic, Ferdinando, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Cesar, Elvira, Jesus, Mauricio.

Italian (Apulia): from the personal name Morea, originally a habitational name from Morea, the medieval name of the Greek region of Peloponnese, named as the land of mulberry trees, from mōrea ‘mulberry’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from any of the places called Morea, in Badajoz, Navarre, and Lleida provinces.

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams was born about 1280, in Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight, was 22 and his mother, Margaret Lindsey, was 20. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Sibilla Graham. He died in 1340, in his hometown, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams est né environ 1280, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Lindsey, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Sibilla Graham. Il est décédé en 1340, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams um 1280 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight 22 und seine Mutter Margaret Lindsey 20. Er hatte mit Sibilla Graham mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1340 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams è nato il circa 1280 nel Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Lindsey, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Sibilla Graham. Morì nel 1340, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdamsが約1280年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knightは22歳，母Margaret Lindseyは20歳であった。彼はSibilla Grahamとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1340年に故郷で61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams(이)가 대략 1280년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Lindsey(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Sibilla Graham(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1340년 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Lindsey, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Sibilla Graham. Ele faleceu em 1340, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams родился около 1280 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Lindsey, 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Sibilla Graham. Он умер в 1340 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams nació aproximadamente 1280, en Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret Lindsey, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Sibilla Graham. Murió en 1340, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años.
